prestazioni: Mercedes-AMG M158 6.0L V12 biturbo (engine code: M158 E60 AL) upgraded with a bespoke Weistec Engineering Stage 3+ turbo kit featuring twin Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos, billet compressor wheels, and a custom titanium exhaust manifold with Inconel 625 wastegates for 1,050+ HP at 7,200 RPM on 93-octane fuel, paired with a Motec M150 ECU with Pagani-specific CAN bus integration for seamless OEM system compatibility

Full titanium 3D-printed intake manifold by CRP Technology with carbon fiber plenum and individual throttle bodies (ITBs) designed via CFD for optimized airflow, reducing throttle response lag by 18% and increasing mid-range torque by 12% at 4,500 RPM

Custom Pagani x Brembo GT-RS 10-piston monobloc calipers with 420mm carbon-ceramic rotors (CCM-R) featuring a proprietary Pagani-developed cooling vane design, reducing brake fade by 30% under track conditions, paired with AP Racing carbon-carbon pads and stainless steel braided lines with titanium fittings
estetica: Full Pagani Zonda-inspired 'F Storm' widebody conversion kit by Novitec Torado, featuring hand-laid carbon fiber fenders with integrated air extractors, a 3D-printed titanium front splitter with active aerodynamic elements, and a rear diffuser with integrated LED lighting and a central titanium exhaust outlet by Akrapović

Custom 'Hyperion' forged magnesium wheels by HRE Performance Wheels (20x10.5 front, 21x13.5 rear) with Pagani-specific offset (-15mm front, -5mm rear) and titanium lug bolts, wrapped in Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (265/30 R20 front, 345/25 R21 rear) with custom Pagani sidewall branding

Full interior retrim by Saddleback Leather using hand-stitched 'Aero Suede' Alcantara with titanium-thread stitching, featuring a custom Pagani x Sparco carbon fiber racing seat with 6-point Schroth harnesses, a titanium roll cage by Hephaestus Racing with integrated LED ambient lighting, and a bespoke Pagani x Bang & Olufsen Beosound Stage sound system with carbon fiber speaker grilles
